scroll_found.title: Research the Rails Distance scroll at a Research Pedestal

train.title: Build a Steam 'n Rails train and run it on an existing rail line

subtitle.text: Steam 'n Rails adds trains. The Nether highway you built is now a train route.

description: CH.07 · RAILS & DISTANCE
▸ Steam 'n Rails extends Minecraft railroads
into a full train network system.
Everything you built in Ch06 runs faster now.
◈ STEAM 'N RAILS OVERVIEW
└ Steam Locomotive: replaces minecart for speed
burns coal or diesel — much faster than carts
└ Passenger Cars: carry multiple players or mobs
└ Cargo Cars: automated item transport between stations
└ Train Schedule: set automatic routes and stops
└ Signal System: prevents train collisions on shared lines
└ Station: passengers board/exit, cargo loads/unloads
◈ NETHER HIGHWAY UPGRADE
└ The Ch06 Nether rail is now a train route
└ Add stations at each portal node
└ Set automatic schedule: Nether Hub → each destination
└ Train arrives on time. Every time.
◈ SCROLL: Rails & Distance
└ Found in: train station ruins, railway guild archives,
station master's office chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full Steam 'n Rails system, network design knowledge
▸ The scroll ends with a schedule.
Departure: dawn. Arrival: before dark.
Every destination. Every day.
The train kept the civilization alive
after the roads stopped being maintained.
▶ Find The Rails & Distance scroll [check]
▶ Build a Steam 'n Rails train and run it [check]
◇ Cargo network: Create fluid/item pipes to station,
train auto-exports to next node.
The full industrial supply chain is possible by Ch07.
